content.speakerText: Alright, I've sent everything—let me know if you need anything else.
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，都发了，有需要随时说。

options.text: Thanks! I'll review it by tomorrow and get back to you.

content.explanation: 正确答案回应了对方的善意并承诺后续跟进，符合职场礼貌收尾的语境。选项2虽礼貌但未回应邮件内容，选项3显得冷漠，选项4质疑对方工作，均不符合语境。

content.speakerText: Just confirming—we're all set on the email? No changes needed?
content.speakerTextCn: 确认一下，邮件没问题了吧？不需要改了？

options.text: Perfect—everything looks good. Thanks for your help!
Can you resend it just in case?

content.explanation: 正确答案A和D都符合确认型对话的简洁收尾风格。选项B语气模糊，缺乏专业性；选项C提出新需求，违背了对方‘确认无变更’的意图，属于偏离主题。

content.speakerText: Thanks for wrapping this up so quickly!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你这么快就处理完了！

options.text: My pleasure! Let me know if anything comes up later.
I'm done, so I'm leaving now.
You're welcome, but I didn't do much.

content.explanation: 正确答案既表达了谦逊的感谢回应，又开放了后续沟通渠道，符合‘礼貌收尾+确认跟进’的核心场景。选项B过于随意，选项C转向个人行为，选项D过度贬低自己，均不符合职场专业语境。

content.template: Thanks! I'll review it by tomorrow and ______ you.
content.hint: 表达‘后续回复’的最自然职场短语
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：get back to someone（后续回复某人）

content.template: Everything looks good. ______ for your help!
content.hint: 简洁表达感谢的常用口语短语
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频感谢表达：Appreciate it（非正式但专业）

content.template: All ______. Thanks again and have a great day!
content.hint: 用于确认无问题时的简洁收尾词
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：All clear（确认无误，收尾常用）

content.speakerText: Alright, I've sent everything—let me know if you need anything else.
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，都发了，有需要随时说。
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I'll review it by tomorrow and get back to you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了对方的善意并承诺后续行动或表达感谢
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否使用了符合职场语境的口语表达

content.speakerText: Just confirming—we're all set on the email? No changes needed?
content.speakerTextCn: 确认一下，邮件没问题了吧？不需要改了？
expectedAnswers: All clear. Thanks for your help!
Actually, could you add the Q3 forecast slide? Just one more.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否准确回应了‘确认无变更’的意图，或礼貌提出合理修改
语言准确性：用词和结构符合职场沟通规范
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'all clear', 'looks good', 或 'add' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Thanks for closing this out so efficiently!
content.speakerTextCn: 感谢你高效地完成了这件事！
expectedAnswers: You're welcome! Let me know if you need anything else down the line.
Happy to help—have a wonderful rest of your day!
No problem! I'll keep you posted if anything changes.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否表达了感谢并开放后续沟通或致意收尾
语言准确性：语法和时态使用正确
表达自然度：是否使用了地道的职场收尾表达，如 'down the line', 'keep you posted'
